recommendations.title: Love at First Fight
recommendations.overview: Arnaud, facing an uncertain future and a dearth of choices in a small French coastal town, meets and falls for the apocalyptic-minded Madeleine, who joins an army boot camp to learn military and survival skills to prepare for the upcoming environment

recommendations.title: Young and Wild
recommendations.overview: Daniela, raised in the bosom of a strict Evangelical family and recently unmasked as a fornicator by her shocked parents, struggles to find her own path to spiritual harmony.

recommendations.title: Look Both Ways
recommendations.overview: On the night of her college graduation, Natalie's life splits into parallel realities after she takes a pregnancy test. What will life and love bring?

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.
